title: After the Mile Ch.: Settling the Storm

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I lost... I'm so sorry, Trainer...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. Time to head back.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Huh?)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I wonder what's wrong with Zephyr...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Oh no, maybe she feels sick!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Zephyr? Are you all right?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: ...The wind.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't run like the wind... My body is still stuck
here...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Weighed down to this spot...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
If I cannot grasp victory here, then how will I ever
go beyond?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I see... It's not that she's feeling unwell. She's
heartsick over her loss.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(What should I do? I want to cheer her up, but I
don't know what to say...)

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
...I'm sorry. I shouldn't have taken that out on
you.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Regardless, thank you. You've calmed the storm
in my heart, somewhat.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? But I didn't do anything...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
...I suppose we'll be seeing each other next at the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Today, I was a frail breeze. But next time, I won't
let anyone dictate my currents.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Zephyr...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm really disappointed in myself too. Let's do our
best next time and leave no regrets behind!
